Our team is committed to making SeaSketc: Ithimba lethu lizibophezele ekwenzeni i-SeaSketch ifinyeleleke kubo bonke abasebenzisi, kuhlanganise nalabo abakhubazekile. Silwela ukulandela i-Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) ukuqinisekisa ukuthi kuba nokuhlangenwe nakho okungenazihibe, ikakhulukazi mayelana nokuzulazula kwekhibhodi kanye nokusebenziseka kwayo yonke indawo. Ngenkathi siqhubeka nokusebenza ukuthuthukisa ukufinyeleleka, siyakwamukela impendulo evela kubasebenzisi bethu. Uma uhlangabezana nanoma yiziphi izinkinga noma uneziphakamiso, sicela usithinte ku-<2>accessibility@seasketch.org</2>.
We conducted a comprehensive review of t: Senze isibuyekezo esibanzi se-SeaSketch interface ukuze sithuthukise ukufinyeleleka. Abasebenzisi manje sebengakwazi ukuzulazula ngokugcwele kumamephu e-base, izendlalelo ezimbozayo, kanye nezinkundla zokuxoxisana besebenzisa okokufaka kwekhibhodi kuphela. Ngaphezu kwalokho, sisebenzise izici eziningi ze-ARIA ukuthuthukisa ukuhambisana nezifundi zesikrini kanye nobunye ubuchwepheshe bokusiza, ukuqinisekisa ulwazi olubandakanya bonke abasebenzisi.
